observabilityTab.noSpansYet: No spans yet — make a request to see traces.
observabilityTab.endpointHelp: Leave empty to generate traces without exporting. Override with OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var.
observabilityTab.restartNote: Note: endpoint and service_name changes take effect on next restart. Sample rate is applied immediately.
observabilityTab.supportIntro: Optionally forward telemetry to Provisa support. SQL literals are stripped by default.
observabilityTab.supportEndpointHelp: Leave empty to disable support telemetry. Override with PROVISA_SUPPORT_OTLP_ENDPOINT env var.
observabilityTab.redactSqlLabel: Redact SQL literals before forwarding to support
observabilityTab.redactAttrsHelp: Attribute keys to drop entirely before sending to support.
